LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 6, 2018 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. JUDGE: NEWTON LAM: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, E-MAIL: MTORREANO@SFTC.ORG (L&M302)

LAW AND MOTION 302, COUNSELOR CORDERO INFORMS THE COURT THAT DUE TO A MEDICAL ISSUE, MR. LARRY WHITE IS UNABLE TO HEAR AND WOULD NOT BE ABLE TO PARTICIPATE IN TODAY'S PROCEEDINGS. THE COURT CONTINUES THE HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF COUNSEL TO FEBRUARY 20, 2018 AT 9:30 AM. THE COURT INSTRUCTS MR. CORDERO TO INFORM THE APPROPRIATE MEDICAL/PRISON STAFF TO MAKE EVERY EFFORT TO PROVIDE MR. LARRY WHITE WITH THE NECESSARY MEDICAL ATTENTION AND/OR EQUIPMENT THAT HE NEEDS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM; MTORREANO@SFTC.ORG.
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-20-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Continued To May-16-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Larry White, (CDC #G-37720 - D1-250L) Plaintiff in Pro Per telephonically with Counselor Goodson.
Kelly Collins, Deputy City Attorney 415-554-3914 of the Office of the City Attorney for Defendant County of San Francisco.

RULING - A R G U E D. Counselor for Plaintiff informs the Court the Plaintiff refuses to use the TDD (telecommunication device for the deaf) provided to him. Plaintiff's call is through the Court's regular phone. Counselor also informs the Court Plaintiff has hearing problems and will not proceed without having Counsel. The Court informs Plaintiff the right to Appeal. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend.

Order signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

Plaintiff'S Motion For Appointment Of Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Larry White, (CDC #G-37720 - D1-250L) Plaintiff in Pro Per telephonically with Counselor Goodson.
Kelly Collins, Deputy City Attorney 415-554-3914 of the Office of the City Attorney for Defendant County of San Francisco.

RULING - A R G U E D. Counselor for Plaintiff informs the Court the Plaintiff refuses to use the TDD (telecommunication device for the deaf) provided to him. Plaintiff's call is through the Court's regular phone. Counselor also informs the Court Plaintiff has hearing problems and will not proceed without having Counsel. The Court informs Plaintiff the right to Appeal. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff'S Motion For Appointment Of Counsel is off calendar as moot based on the Court's ruling on the Demurrer.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Continued To Feb-20-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kelly Collins, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, T:415.554.3914, for defendant/moving party;
Larry White, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf, with Mr. Cordero, Prison Counselor /Facilitator, appearing telephonically.

RULING: Counselor Cordero informs the court that due to a medical issue, Mr. Larry White is unable to hear and would not be able to participate in today's proceedings. The Court continues the hearing on DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT to February 20, 2018 at 9:30 am. The Court instructs Mr. Cordero to inform the appropriate medical/prison staff to make every effort to provide Mr. Larry White with the necessary medical attention and/or equipment that he needs.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

Plaintiff'S Motion For Appointment Of Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Continued To Feb-20-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Larry White, plaintiff/moving party appearing on his own behalf, with Mr. Cordero, Prison Counselor /Facilitator, appearing telephonically;
Kelly Collins, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, T:415.554.3914, for defendant.

RULING: Counselor Cordero informs the court that due to a medical issue, Mr. Larry White is unable to hear and would not be able to participate in today's proceedings. The Court continues the hearing on PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF COUNSEL to February 20, 2018 at 9:30 am. The Court instructs Mr. Cordero to inform the appropriate medical/prison staff to make every effort to provide Mr. Larry White with the necessary medical attention and/or equipment that he needs.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Continued To Feb-06-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Silvia Jaral, Legal Counselor at Calipatria State Prison, California Department of Corrections (760-348-7000 x 6452) appears on behalf of plaintiff, Larry White, only for the purposes of relaying information between plaintiff and the Court - appearance is made by telephone on the clerk's business line

Deputy City Attorney, Kelly Collins of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (415-554-3914) appears as counsel for defendant/demurring party, County of San Francisco

No other appearance is made in this matter

The state prison legal counselor informs the Court that, although plaintiff is present and standing by, he is having medical issues and cannot hear. The matter is continued to allow time for plaintiff to seek medical attention. Court suggests plaintiff make effort to file opposition papers to the City's demurrer.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is CONTINUED to February 6, 2018 at 9:30 AM in Department 302.

Judge: Newton Lam: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, e-mail: mtorreano@sftc.org (L&M302)
